# Chessperiment

> Chessperiment is a free, browser-based game design engine for creating custom chess variants and abstract strategy games. No templates — real customization. Users describe their game idea in plain language and the built-in AI generates the full variant instantly.

Chessperiment lets anyone — with no coding knowledge — design completely novel board games using a Scratch-style visual logic editor. It is not a chess-playing site; it is a game creation sandbox.

## Core Features

- **AI Variant Generator**: Describe a game idea in plain language (e.g. "chess where pawns explode when captured") and the AI instantly creates boards, pieces, and rules as a complete project.
- **Piece Editor**: Define custom chess piece movement using visual logic blocks. Supports leapers (pieces that jump to fixed offsets, like knights), riders (pieces that slide along vectors, like rooks/bishops), conditional triggers (`onCapture`, `onMove`, `onIsThreatened`), and effects (`transform`, `kill`, `explode`, `modVar`).
- **Board Editor**: Create boards of any dimension. Supports hexagonal boards, non-rectangular shapes (toggle individual squares on/off), and square-specific rule overrides (teleport zones, territory zones, promotion areas).
- **Square Editor**: Assign unique rules to individual squares — enables advanced variants including Fractal Chess (miniature boards inside a single square).
- **Multiplayer**: Share a room code or link to play custom variants with friends in real time. No account or download required to join.
- **Stockfish Integration**: Built-in Stockfish engine applies to custom game states including non-standard board topologies and custom piece definitions.
- **Marketplace**: Community library for sharing and downloading custom variants, piece sets, and board designs. All content is free.

## Positioning

- **Not a chess-playing site** (not competing with Chess.com or Lichess)
- **Competes with**: ChessCraft (mobile-only, template-based), Chess Remix (paywalled features), Omnichess (complex UI), PyChess/pychess.org (preset variants only, no creation sandbox), Protochess (no marketplace/community)
- **Key differentiator**: Deepest logic system (conditional triggers, state variables, multi-step sequences) + fully free + web-native + social marketplace

## Target Users

Board game designers, abstract strategy game prototypers, fairy chess enthusiasts, and anyone who has hit the limits of existing chess customization tools.

## Technical Stack

Next.js 14, TypeScript, Firebase (Firestore), Socket.io (real-time multiplayer), Redis (cache), Stockfish (engine analysis).
